title: Marine Vessel Equipment
description:
Marine Vessel Equipment
                                        In collaboration with European and Asian shipyards and manufacturers Eristic (T) Investment Ltd supply the Pontoons,
                                        Work boats, Moring boats, Tug boats, Pilot boats, Patrol boats and other similar vessels on special order/contract.

The Polyethene Navigational Equipment and other Navigational Aids are within our scope of supply.

We offer after sales support, overseas and onsite training to the end user crews, operators and maintenance technicians also spare parts for all equipment supplied..
                                    
                                
                            


                            
                                
                                    
                                    
                                        Agricultural Equipments
                                        We support agriculture through empowering the farmers by providing the modern and affordable mechanization.

We undertake to supply the wide range of tractors ranging from power tillers to heavy duty tractors including its corresponding farm implements.

The implements range from farm preparation, planting, weeding, chemical application, fertilizers application, harvesting and farm products processing.

                                        
                                    
                                
                            

                            
                                
                                    
                                    
                                        After Sales Support
                                        We provide cost effective and reliable after sales services to our clients for the supplied goods during the entire period the goods will be operational.
